select.if:
SELECT * FROM budget_ledger WHERE deleted = 0 AND (biz_type, biz_code, biz_item_code) IN
(#{item.bizType}, #{item.bizCode}, #{item.bizItemCode})

SELECT * FROM budget_ledger WHERE deleted = 0 AND biz_type = 'APPLY' AND biz_code IN
#{item.demandOrderNo}

SELECT * FROM budget_ledger WHERE deleted = 0 AND biz_type = 'APPLY' AND (biz_code, biz_item_code) IN
(#{item.demandOrderNo}, #{item.demandDetailLineNo})

SELECT * FROM budget_ledger WHERE deleted = 0 AND biz_type = 'CONTRACT' AND biz_code IN
#{item.contractNo}

SELECT * FROM budget_ledger WHERE deleted = 0 AND biz_type = 'CLAIM' AND biz_code IN
#{item.claimOrderNo}

SELECT * FROM budget_ledger WHERE deleted = 0 AND biz_type = 'ADJUST' AND biz_code IN
#{item.adjustOrderNo}

update.foreach: UPDATE budget_ledger SET biz_type = #{item.bizType}, biz_code = #{item.bizCode}, biz_item_code = #{item.bizItemCode}, effect_type = #{item.effectType}, year = #{item.year}, month = #{item.month}, actual_year = #{item.actualYear}, actual_month = #{item.actualMonth}, morg_code = #{item.morgCode}, control_ehr_cd = #{item.controlEhrCd}, control_ehr_nm = #{item.controlEhrNm}, budget_org_cd = #{item.budgetOrgCd}, budget_org_nm = #{item.budgetOrgNm}, budget_subject_code = #{item.budgetSubjectCode}, master_project_code = #{item.masterProjectCode}, erp_asset_type = #{item.erpAssetType}, is_internal = #{item.isInternal}, currency = #{item.currency}, amount = #{item.amount}, amount_consumed_q_one = #{item.amountConsumedQOne}, amount_consumed_q_two = #{item.amountConsumedQTwo}, amount_consumed_q_three = #{item.amountConsumedQThree}, amount_consumed_q_four = #{item.amountConsumedQFour}, amount_available = #{item.amountAvailable}, pool_dimension_key = #{item.poolDimensionKey}, deduction_from_ledger_biz_key = #{item.deductionFromLedgerBizKey}, metadata = #{item.metadata}, version = #{item.version}, version_pre = #{item.versionPre}, operator = #{item.operator}, operator_no = #{item.operatorNo}, updater = #{item.updater}, update_time = SYSTIMESTAMP, deleted = #{item.deleted} WHERE id = #{item.id}
